deadLauncherMarkers.style: position: fixed; pointer-events: none; border: 1.5px solid rgba(26, 46, 79, 0.55); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(26, 46, 79, 0.04); box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgba(26, 46, 79, 0.13) 0px 8px 24px; transition: transform 120ms ease-out, top 120ms ease-out, left 120ms ease-out, width 120ms ease-out, height 120ms ease-out, opacity 120ms ease-out, border-color 120ms ease-out, background-color 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 120ms ease-out; z-index: 2147483645; display: no

position: fixed; right: 24px; top: 24px; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(27, 26, 23, 0.1); background: rgb(251, 248, 241); backdrop-filter: none; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 4px 16px; color: var(--dlens-mode-accent, #1a2e4f); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; z-index: 2147483640; cursor: pointer; transition: 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); display: grid; place-items: center;

deadLauncherLogs.message: %cStop! font-family:helvetica; font-size:20px; font-size:50px; font-weight:bold; color:red; -webkit-text-stroke:1px black;

%cThis is a browser feature intended for developers. If someone told you to copy-paste something here to enable a Threads feature or "hack" someone's account, it is a scam and will give them access to your Threads account. font-family:helvetica; font-size:20px;
%cSee https://www.facebook.com/selfxss for more information. font-family:helvetica; font-size:20px;
%c
